notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Ian Happ scores. Seiya Suzuki scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Francisco Alvarez reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nico Hoerner. Bo Bichette scores. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Francisco Alvarez reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nico Hoerner. Bo Bichette scores. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Francisco Alvarez reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nico Hoerner. Bo Bichette scores. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Francisco Lindor to first baseman Mark Vientos. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Carson Benge out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Francisco Alvarez reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nico Hoerner. Bo Bichette scores. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Francisco Alvarez reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nico Hoerner. Bo Bichette scores. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor flies out to shortstop Dansby Swanson.
